stem: A banking study surveys 40 approved loans and observes 13 positive outcomes out of 40 (32.5%). Estimate the true loan default rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.325. Wilson 95% CI: [0.2008, 0.4798]. Point estimate: 0.3403.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
